scripts.test: npm -w shared/commission-engine test && npm -w backend test
scripts.dev:all: npm run migrate && npm run seed && concurrently -k -n backend,admin,agent "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:admin" "npm run dev:agent"
scripts.dev:all:fast: concurrently -k -n backend,admin,agent "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:admin" "npm run dev:agent"
scripts.start:all: concurrently -k -n backend,admin,agent "npm run start:backend" "npm run start:admin" "npm run start:agent"
scripts.build:all: npm -w admin-web run build && npm -w agent-web run build
scripts.verify: npm test && npm run typecheck && npm -w admin-web run build && npm -w agent-web run build
scripts.server:restart: npm run server:stop && npm run server:start
